context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 refactoring of food_orders.py completed successfully. 6 functions were extracted to food_order_helpers.py: check_batch_readiness_and_notify_driver, calculate_optimal_pickup_order, add_driver_earnings_food, add_seller_earnings_food, add_earnings_directly, add_seller_earnings_directly. Combined with Phase 1 (helper functions) and Phase 2 (Pydantic models), the refactoring has reduced food_orders.py from original size to 4595 lines. All imports work correctly and the backend starts without errors.
